penalties.description: The marked circle was not completely cut out by the end of the video sequence. The circular piece remains partially attached to the gauze.

reasoning: The task shows clear precision cutting activity with instruments following the marked circle path on the gauze. However, the sequence ends without showing complete circle release - the marked circular piece appears to remain partially attached. Since task completion requires the marked circle to be completely cut out, this constitutes an incomplete task. The video ends at what appears to be around 116 seconds based on the countdown timer progression from 03:00 to approximately 01:04.
